_provenance: Schema fixture — derived from database.get_shadow_divergence() return shape (PA-18). Fields: symphony_id keys, each entry with today (float|null), cumulative (float|null). R15 adds 'name' (str). Backward-compat: legacy entries without 'name' fall back to truncated ID.
_captured_shape: get_shadow_divergence returns {by_symphony: {<id>: {today, cumulative}}, portfolio_today}. R15 adds 'name' field.
